notes: Current parser package registry format remains admissible when protocol and parser API match.
Older supported SBPS minor rows remain resolvable through min/max range checks.
Unsupported registry schema must fail closed.
Current SBLR execution envelope remains admissible after revalidation.
Internal API accepts current major with receiver-supported minor only.
Unsupported SBLR envelope versions must fail closed with an exact diagnostic.
Compatible implementation or metadata changes retain fixed function UUIDs.
Incompatible semantic changes must not reuse UUIDs without migration evidence.
Additive fixture fields are allowed when defaults preserve old expected behavior.
Required-field removals or expected-result semantic changes require migration evidence.
Current databases open with current seed/catalog compatibility metadata.
Older or dirty compatible databases must not be opened writable silently.
Unsupported database formats fail closed before write admission.
